programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
What We Did on Our Holiday
Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Dorothy faces the Candlemaker with tragic results, while the team struggle with loss. Rita may hold the key, but is he ready to answer?

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Dorothy faces the Candlemaker with tragic results, while the team struggle with loss. Rita may hold the key, but is he ready to answer?

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: A relaxing vacation to escape the Doom Patrol's recent loss proves to be anything but, especially when an unexpected evil lurks nearby.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: In the tunnel of souls, the team confront personal purgatories. At the manor, Dorothy and Larry turn to a specialised detective agency for help.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: The Doom Patrol are back in the land of the living, but their time spent in the afterlife has come with some unexpected consequences.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Madame Rouge seeks the Doom Patrol's aid after uncovering her past. While others infiltrate, Rita uncovers a surprising bond with a friend.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Thrown back in time, Rita navigates the Bureau of Normalcy. Jane gives Kay her first freedom, while Larry finds long-needed closure with his son.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Thrown back in time, Rita navigates the Bureau of Normalcy. Jane gives Kay her first freedom, while Larry finds long-needed closure with his son.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Warned by the Sisterhood of Dada, Madame Rouge raises the alarm. The Doom Patrol must rally or risk the Eternal Flagellation consuming them.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Warned by the Sisterhood of Dada, Madame Rouge raises the alarm. The Doom Patrol must rally or risk the Eternal Flagellation consuming them.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After clashing with Rita, Madame Rouge seeks favour with the Brotherhood of Evil, while the Doom Patrol face the rising threat on their backs.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After clashing with Rita, Madame Rouge seeks favour with the Brotherhood of Evil, while the Doom Patrol face the rising threat on their backs.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: With the Brotherhood closing in, the Doom Patrol must unite and embrace their true selves, or risk losing everything once and for all.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: With the Brotherhood closing in, the Doom Patrol must unite and embrace their true selves, or risk losing everything once and for all.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: As they struggle to function as a cohesive group, the Doom Patrol are confronted by a horrifying realisation in the future.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: As they struggle to function as a cohesive group, the Doom Patrol are confronted by a horrifying realisation in the future.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: A desperate Doom Patrol strategise ways to wipe out the zombie butts and reverse their grim future.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: A desperate Doom Patrol strategise ways to wipe out the zombie butts and reverse their grim future.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Larry and Jane seek new purpose in Keeg and Kay's absence. A mysterious invitation to a retrospective comes at the perfect time for a newly ousted Rita.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: When the safety of Danny and everyone housed within is compromised, Dorothy is forced to step up, with some unexpected help.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: When the safety of Danny and everyone housed within is compromised, Dorothy is forced to step up, with some unexpected help.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: When Rita awakens unexpectedly aged, a mishandled spell turns the Doom Patrol into teenagers, just as Willoughby asks for their help stopping Immortus - and the end of the world.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: As Jane ropes Cliff into longevity-hunting, Vic and Deric search for Larry, and Rouge tries to sway Rita into joining her on a trip to Orqwith.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: As Dorothy and Casey team up for a new mission, the Doom Patrol's pursuit of Immortus lead them to a superhero parade.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After realising they're trapped in a continuous loop of music-filled Immortimas Days, the Doom Patrol confront the people they've become while reckoning with who they once were.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After realising they're trapped in a continuous loop of music-filled Immortimas Days, the Doom Patrol confront the people they've become while reckoning with who they once were.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After uncovering what she believes is the source of Immortus' power, Rouge tries to rally the Doom Patrol, but the rapidly ageing team seems more content to enjoy the little time they have left.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After discovering a series of portals, Vic secures one hour for each of his team members to search for their longevities. As they're thrown into pivotal moments from the past, their futures come into focus.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After discovering a series of portals, Vic secures one hour for each of his team members to search for their longevities. As they're thrown into pivotal moments from the past, their futures come into focus.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: After returning to Cloverton, the Doom Patrol gather for a final mission - one that proves to be unlike any they've had before.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: As they struggle to function as a cohesive group, the Doom Patrol are confronted by a horrifying realisation in the future.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: A desperate Doom Patrol strategise ways to wipe out the zombie butts and reverse their grim future.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Larry and Jane seek new purpose in Keeg and Kay's absence. A mysterious invitation to a retrospective comes at the perfect time for a newly ousted Rita.

programme.title: Doom Patrol
programme.desc: Larry and Jane seek new purpose in Keeg and Kay's absence. A mysterious invitation to a retrospective comes at the perfect time for a newly ousted Rita.

programme.title: AFLW: PF NMT v MEL
programme.desc: Defending AFLW premier North Melbourne hosts rivals Melbourne at Ikon Park for a place in the 2025 Grand Final.

programme.title: AFLW: PF BRI v CAR
programme.desc: A blockbuster Preliminary Final as Brisbane and Carlton battle it out for a place in the 2025 decider under lights in Springfield.

programme.title: AFL: Collingwood v Essendon
programme.desc: It's the 30th anniversary of one of Australia's greatest sporting traditions as two of the league's biggest clubs meet on Anzac Day.

programme.title: AFLW: PF BRI v CAR
programme.desc: A blockbuster Preliminary Final as Brisbane and Carlton battle it out for a place in the 2025 decider under lights in Springfield.

programme.title: AFLW Grand Final Glory: 17 GF BRI v ADE

programme.desc: They didn't drop a game throughout the 2024 home and away season, but the Kangaroos had to face their demons to win the Grand Final.

programme.desc: Join the team for an extensive preview of all the action to come; with the latest news, best analysis, entertainment & interviews.

programme.desc: Join the team for a review of all the action; with the latest news, best analysis, entertainment & interviews.

programme.title: AFLW: GF NMT v BRI
programme.desc: Competition powerhouses North Melbourne and Brisbane clash in the AFLW Grand Final for the third year in a row at Ikon Park.

programme.title: AFLW Mini: GF NM v BRI
programme.desc: Competition powerhouses North Melbourne and Brisbane clash in the AFLW Grand Final for the third year in a row at Ikon Park.

programme.title: AFLW: GF NMT v BRI
programme.desc: Competition powerhouses North Melbourne and Brisbane clash in the AFLW Grand Final for the third year in a row at Ikon Park.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Five new contestants take on hilarious challenges, hoping to impress Greg Davies with wit and creativity as they compete to claim the Taskmaster crown.

programme.title: Car Crash TV
programme.desc: We start the show by getting in the ring to go 12 rounds with Bike Tyson before playing everyone's favourite car crash-related guessing game Hit Or Miss.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess" "Worst Case Scenario" "Redneck Good Times" and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess" "Worst Case Scenario" "Redneck Good Times" and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another episode of the hilarious game show where everything is made up and the points don't matter. Mel B. guest stars alongside regulars Wayne Brady, Gary Anthony Williams and Colin Mochrie.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: The team investigate the twin vanishings of two massive cargo ships; in 1941, the USS Proteus disappears after crossing the Bermuda Triangle. Two weeks later, the USS Nereus, also goes missing.

programme.title: 101 Places to Party Before You Die
programme.desc: The island of Enchantment serves up ATV rainforest adventures, a ride on the pork highway, and plenty of rum as Adam and Jon take the party to Puerto Rico.

programme.title: 101 Places to Party Before You Die
Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: Greg 'Vegas' Jones is gone. He lost his deckhand job on Iceland's Valdimar longliner for leaving the crew in the lurch just an hour before Captain Frosti was set to depart.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh Rowland returns to the winter roads with a grudge and a goal: run his previous employer out of town. For the first time in seven years, Hugh is a boss again.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: It's a white knuckle ride as Sludge climbs a mountain with an angry load. Cameron Smith carts a dump truck out of the Nullarbor - and straight into harm's way. Steve Grahame's on an urgent mission in the wet.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: It's a space race at the Gold & Silver for an autographed Apollo 10 book. Can Rick land a deal before the seller lifts off?

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Sludge takes on foreign roads and strange loads in the land of the kiwi. Turbo's new truck gets busted and bashed on a tour of destruction.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: It's a white knuckle ride as Sludge climbs a mountain with an angry load. Cameron Smith carts a dump truck out of the Nullarbor - and straight into harm's way. Steve Grahame's on an urgent mission in the wet.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: Greg 'Vegas' Jones is gone. He lost his deckhand job on Iceland's Valdimar longliner for leaving the crew in the lurch just an hour before Captain Frosti was set to depart.

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Former Soccer Saturday buddies Jeff Stelling and Chris Kamara reunite for an epic journey across Sri Lanka.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Hugh Rowland returns to the winter roads with a grudge and a goal: run his previous employer out of town. For the first time in seven years, Hugh is a boss again.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: When Colette learns Noa is seeing someone, Ceci urges her to use a little magic to win him back. Meanwhile, Barb hunts for the culprit behind rude DMV graffiti.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When a customer comes in with items from Tony Soprano's wardrobe, can Rick make him an offer he can't refuse, or will he fuggedaboutit?

programme.title: Live: Abu Dhabi T10: Day 10
programme.desc: The 10-over format gets underway in UAE with Marcus Stonis, Tim David and more competing for this year's T10 title.

programme.title: Live: Abu Dhabi T10: Day 10
programme.desc: The 10-over format gets underway in UAE with Marcus Stonis, Tim David and more competing for this year's T10 title.

programme.title: The Ashes Mini: 1st Test Day 1
programme.desc: Day one of an Ashes series ... it doesn't get any better. Steve Smith vs Joe Root, two Aussie debutants and a bit of Bazball to get things going.

programme.title: The Ashes Mini: 1st Test Day 2
programme.desc: Day Two. The Aussies will want to strike back early after 19 wickets fell on a frenetic opening day.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible II
programme.desc: A secret agent is sent to Sydney to find and destroy a genetically modified disease called Chimera.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Earth is covered with water and the human race struggles to survive on dilapidated boats and makeshift floating cities.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: A year after his friend's death, Gabe must return to the dreaded mountain peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against criminals, nature and himself.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Game
programme.desc: Run by the shadowy Consumer Recreations Services, the Game never quite declares its rules or objectives, but soon Nicholas finds himself in its grasp, and his ordered life starts to fall apart.

programme.title: The Hunt for Red October
programme.desc: A Russian submarine commander attempts to defect to the US, bringing both sides to the brink of war.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Krys want to revamp their abandoned orangery, but it's flooding. The Hutsons need to chop down a huge tree precariously close to a greenhouse.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Krys want to revamp their abandoned orangery, but it's flooding. The Hutsons need to chop down a huge tree precariously close to a greenhouse.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts travel across the nation to search for hidden treasures, from household items to one-of-a kind collectibles; the experts then head to auction to battle it out.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Before the Accession, Fiona welcomes the Queen Consort and learns of her close ties to the Eden Project and The Big Lunch.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Before the Accession, Fiona welcomes the Queen Consort and learns of her close ties to the Eden Project and The Big Lunch.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Anita Manning looks after proceedings at Newmarket Racecourse, where two teams of best friends go head-to-head.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Anita Manning looks after proceedings at Newmarket Racecourse, where two teams of best friends go head-to-head.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 13-year-old cyclist is rushed to Emergency after coming off her bike at high speed. Meanwhile, a 76-year-old woman has suffered a suspected stroke.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 13-year-old cyclist is rushed to Emergency after coming off her bike at high speed. Meanwhile, a 76-year-old woman has suffered a suspected stroke.

programme.title: Celebrity Sewing Bee Festive Specials
programme.desc: Sara Pascoe celebrates the new year by inviting Drag Race winner Lawrence Chaney, comedian Rose Matafeo, singer Claire Richards from Steps and journalist Kirsty Wark to try their hand at creating party clothes.

programme.title: Celebrity Sewing Bee Festive Specials
programme.desc: Sara Pascoe celebrates the new year by inviting Drag Race winner Lawrence Chaney, comedian Rose Matafeo, singer Claire Richards from Steps and journalist Kirsty Wark to try their hand at creating party clothes.

programme.title: Find Me A Beach House
programme.desc: Tony and Merrilee are boating enthusiasts who are looking for their ideal beach home on beautiful Hamilton Island in Queensland that is close to the marina, has at least three bedrooms, and also a pool.

programme.title: Find Me A Beach House
programme.desc: Tony and Merrilee are boating enthusiasts who are looking for their ideal beach home on beautiful Hamilton Island in Queensland that is close to the marina, has at least three bedrooms, and also a pool.

programme.title: Luxury Escapes: World's Best Holidays
programme.desc: Pia Miranda and Mike Reid explore Iceland's waterfalls, whales, and lagoons before London glamour at The Shard with fine dining above the city.

programme.title: Luxury Escapes: World's Best Holidays
programme.desc: Pia Miranda and Mike Reid explore Iceland's waterfalls, whales, and lagoons before London glamour at The Shard with fine dining above the city.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona and Alex met while training to be Paramedics. Fast forward 11 years and they're facing their first disagreement to stay or leave their home. Fiona wants to stay in her comfort zone while Alex thinks it's time to move on to something bigger and better. Can Neale breathe new life into their house or will Andrew rescue their future dreams and find their next forever home.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Amanda and Annette want a spacious futureproof bungalow in a serene setting, whereas first-time buyers Danit and Rafi are after a one-bed flat close to the buzz of Brighton and Hove.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: This week Bryce and Veronica step in to help two mother - daughter house hunting teams on opposite coasts. In Sydney it's an emotional search for Bryce with grieving mother, Quanita, and daughter, Alex, tossing up between a family home in the Blue Mountains or an apartment on the Lower North Shore. In Perth, Veronica's with enthusiastic first time buyer, Jessica, and mum, Karen, who both thinks it's time for Jess to cut the apron strings and make a move.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location Australia
programme.desc: Bryce supports grieving mother Quanita in an emotional search, while Veronica helps first time buyer Jessica and her mum find a place on the opposite coast.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: The difficulty of selling a cluttered home is one that every real estate agent can relate to. Over the years Andrew has encountered many cluttered homes but this one might just take the trophy.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: The difficulty of selling a cluttered home is one that every real estate agent can relate to. Over the years Andrew has encountered many cluttered homes but this one might just take the trophy.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Single mum Crissy's home is classed only as a shed, making it impossible for prospective buyers to get finance. With three young children and a chronic illness, she desperately needs help.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Mary and David have made the decision to move to mainland Australia due to limited work. They live in a picturesque location, but can the team bring their house up to standards and help this family move on?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona and Alex met while training to be Paramedics. Fast forward 11 years and they're facing their first disagreement to stay or leave their home. Fiona wants to stay in her comfort zone while Alex thinks it's time to move on to something bigger and better. Can Neale breathe new life into their house or will Andrew rescue their future dreams and find their next forever home.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Dion and Turi have brave plans for their harbourside heritage home. They want to preserve its Edwardian character while adding a new wing with a ramped gallery.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Dion and Turi have brave plans for their harbourside heritage home. They want to preserve its Edwardian character while adding a new wing with a ramped gallery.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help people who are unhappy with their homes and guide them with their valuable tips to renovate their abodes.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Dion and Turi have brave plans for their harbourside heritage home. They want to preserve its Edwardian character while adding a new wing with a ramped gallery.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Georgina and Philip are building high with sweeping views across the entire bay. But in what becomes the longest delay ever witnessed on the series, can they muster the financial and emotional will to keep going?

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: The difficulty of selling a cluttered home is one that every real estate agent can relate to. Over the years Andrew has encountered many cluttered homes but this one might just take the trophy.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Mary and David have made the decision to move to mainland Australia due to limited work. They live in a picturesque location, but can the team bring their house up to standards and help this family move on?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Fiona & Alex, paramedics who met in training, clash over staying or moving. She wants comfort, he wants change. Neale updates their home while Andrew looks for their next one.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Gus, 49, falls off a ladder; Daisy, 19, vomits blood after a recent tonsillectomy; Leonard, 93, is sent to resus after falling down stairs.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: A 13-year-old cyclist is rushed to Emergency after coming off her bike at high speed. Meanwhile, a 76-year-old woman has suffered a suspected stroke.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In Stoke, the crews work out how to move a woman with a horrendous fracture, and answer a call from an old woman whose carer has fainted while fasting for Ramadan.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: In Stoke, the crews work out how to move a woman with a horrendous fracture, and answer a call from an old woman whose carer has fainted while fasting for Ramadan.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A bedridden detective teams up with a sharp rookie to catch a sadistic killer who leaves bizarre clues behind. As they close in they become his next targets.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: A financial TV host and his producer are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio.

programme.title: The Commuter
programme.desc: A businessman unexpectedly gets caught up in a criminal conspiracy during his daily commute home on a train.

programme.title: The Bourne Ultimatum
programme.desc: Jason Bourne is racing to solve the mystery of his past while being hunted by the very organisation that hired him.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: A mother who suspects a cover-up over the poisoning of a town's water supply single-handedly takes on a powerful California power company.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A home-schooled newcomer is introduced to the blackboard jungle, where she joins the social outcasts in a planned sabotage of the cool kids.

programme.title: Dear Christmas
programme.desc: A podcast host develops an unexpected romance with a local firefighter during the holidays.

programme.title: Noel
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve in New York City, and with a little help from each other, five people will discover new meaning on Christmas Day.

programme.title: Vampire Bats
programme.desc: A college professor (Lucy Lawless) tries to stop aggressive, mutated bats killing people in Louisiana.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: When a teenage rebel is sent to Japan to live with his father, he is hooked on the treacherous world of street racing.

programme.title: Great White
programme.desc: A flight to a remote atoll turns into a nightmare for five passengers when their seaplane is destroyed and they're trapped on a raft, 160km from shore, with sharks lurking beneath them.

programme.title: Lake Placid
programme.desc: An investigative team, armed with high-powered weaponry and a biting sense of sarcasm, must work together to defeat Black Lake's most ferocious resident: a 30-foot, prehistoric crocodile.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit
programme.desc: When Ryan believes he's uncovered a Russian terrorist plot to collapse the United States economy, he goes from being an analyst to a spy, fighting to save his own life and those of countless others.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After a rocky 'first' meeting, Henry and Clare attempt to reset with a second date, but she still struggles to rectify this version of Henry with the man she's known and loved all her life.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After meeting her soulmate at age six, Clare laments a linear lifetime defined by waiting for Henry's unpredictable appearances.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After meeting her soulmate at age six, Clare laments a linear lifetime defined by waiting for Henry's unpredictable appearances.

programme.title: Murder in Boston
programme.desc: The shooting of a white couple by an alleged Black assailant makes headlines, exposing Boston's troubled legacy of racial violence and segregation.

programme.title: El Accidente
programme.desc: Learning that her husband might have been keeping a terrible secret, Lucia sets out to uncover the truth.

programme.title: El Accidente
programme.desc: Learning that her husband might have been keeping a terrible secret, Lucia sets out to uncover the truth.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After meeting her soulmate at age six, Clare laments a linear lifetime defined by waiting for Henry's unpredictable appearances.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After meeting her soulmate at age six, Clare laments a linear lifetime defined by waiting for Henry's unpredictable appearances.

programme.title: The Great Entertainer
programme.desc: A tribute to Brian Walsh's imprint on Australian media; reshaping TV and sport, mentoring talent, and championing a more modern, diverse culture.

programme.title: Murder in Boston
programme.desc: The shooting of a white couple by an alleged Black assailant makes headlines, exposing Boston's troubled legacy of racial violence and segregation.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: While recovering from brain surgery, Cathy struggles with the demands of her teaching job as she plans to celebrate Adam's 16th birthday.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: While recovering from brain surgery, Cathy struggles with the demands of her teaching job as she plans to celebrate Adam's 16th birthday.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: While recovering from brain surgery, Cathy struggles with the demands of her teaching job as she plans to celebrate Adam's 16th birthday.

programme.title: The Time Traveler's Wife
programme.desc: After meeting her soulmate at age six, Clare laments a linear lifetime defined by waiting for Henry's unpredictable appearances.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate a truck driver's body, torn apart by animals. Will meets Hannibal's bizarre new patient and trades notes about Hannibal; Hannibal tests Will to determine Will's true self.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate a truck driver's body, torn apart by animals. Will meets Hannibal's bizarre new patient and trades notes about Hannibal; Hannibal tests Will to determine Will's true self.

programme.title: Mix Tape
programme.desc: In Sheffield, 1989, teenagers Daniel and Alison meet at a house party, and bond over their shared love for music. The relationship they forge that night will follow them forever.

programme.title: The Great Entertainer
programme.desc: A tribute to Brian Walsh's imprint on Australian media; reshaping TV and sport, mentoring talent, and championing a more modern, diverse culture.

programme.title: The Great Entertainer
programme.desc: A tribute to Brian Walsh's imprint on Australian media; reshaping TV and sport, mentoring talent, and championing a more modern, diverse culture.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
All Her Fault
programme.desc: Carrie's obsession deepens as she executes her plan to abduct Milo, but her scheme unravels in shocking fashion.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Carrie's obsession deepens as she executes her plan to abduct Milo, but her scheme unravels in shocking fashion.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Marissa learns the dark truth about Carrie's past and faces an impossible choice to protect her family.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate a truck driver's body, torn apart by animals. Will meets Hannibal's bizarre new patient and trades notes about Hannibal; Hannibal tests Will to determine Will's true self.

programme.title: Hannibal
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate a truck driver's body, torn apart by animals. Will meets Hannibal's bizarre new patient and trades notes about Hannibal; Hannibal tests Will to determine Will's true self.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: Mix Tape
programme.desc: In Sheffield, 1989, teenagers Daniel and Alison meet at a house party, and bond over their shared love for music. The relationship they forge that night will follow them forever.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Carrie's obsession deepens as she executes her plan to abduct Milo, but her scheme unravels in shocking fashion.

programme.title: All Her Fault

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Marissa learns the dark truth about Carrie's past and faces an impossible choice to protect her family.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: Falco
programme.desc: The detectives are investigating the abduction of a businessman's son, which is in the hands of La Fauna, a supposed activist group that defends the environment and social equity. Bravo follows Falco.

programme.title: Falco
programme.desc: The detectives are investigating the abduction of a businessman's son, which is in the hands of La Fauna, a supposed activist group that defends the environment and social equity. Bravo follows Falco.

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Carrie's obsession deepens as she executes her plan to abduct Milo, but her scheme unravels in shocking fashion.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: A kindhearted man who works to help people find jobs is manipulated into doubling for the President of the United States after he suffers a stroke in the arms of a young woman.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: Annie's life is a mess. But when she finds out her lifelong best friend is engaged, she simply must serve as Lillian's maid of honour.

programme.title: How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
How to Lose a Guy in 10 Days
Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah appears on TV as a guest on a televised bake-off, but someone on the show is found murdered, so Hannah helps her detective boyfriend find the killer.

programme.title: Murder, She Baked: Just Desserts
programme.desc: Hannah appears on TV as a guest on a televised bake-off, but someone on the show is found murdered, so Hannah helps her detective boyfriend find the killer.

programme.title: Pleasantville
programme.desc: Two modern American teenagers are sucked into their television set and end up living in a black-and-white '50s sitcom.

programme.title: Pleasantville
programme.desc: Two modern American teenagers are sucked into their television set and end up living in a black-and-white '50s sitcom.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: "Scoob!" reveals how lifelong friends Scooby and Shaggy first met and how they joined with young detectives Fred, Velma and Daphne to form the famous Mystery Inc. Now, with hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world. As they race to stop this global "dogpocalypse", the gang discovers that Scooby has a secret legacy and an epic destiny greater than anyone imagined.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: "Scoob!" reveals how lifelong friends Scooby and Shaggy first met and how they joined with young detectives Fred, Velma and Daphne to form the famous Mystery Inc. Now, with hundreds of cases solved and adventures shared, Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world. As they race to stop this global "dogpocalypse", the gang discovers that Scooby has a secret legacy and an epic destiny greater than anyone imagined.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Three unemployed henchmen find themselves working for the world's first-ever female supervillain and her inventor husband, who plan to take over the world.

programme.title: Minions
programme.desc: Three unemployed henchmen find themselves working for the world's first-ever female supervillain and her inventor husband, who plan to take over the world.

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure. The pair quickly become best buddies - and partners in crime - pickpocketing their way out of poverty and quickly believing they are the real cats' whiskers! Setting their sights higher, Top Cat and Benny hatch a plan to steal diamonds from crime boss Mr Big. Along the way, our heroes meet fellow alley cats Choo Choo, Fancy-Fancy and Brain, and together they're a formidable bunch. However, when Mr Big catches up with them and captures Top Cat, can his new friends save the day?

programme.title: Top Cat Begins
programme.desc: Poor, lonely and living on the streets, Top Cat meets Benny, a naive and good-hearted cat looking for adventure. The pair quickly become best buddies - and partners in crime - pickpocketing their way out of poverty and quickly believing they are the real cats' whiskers! Setting their sights higher, Top Cat and Benny hatch a plan to steal diamonds from crime boss Mr Big. Along the way, our heroes meet fellow alley cats Choo Choo, Fancy-Fancy and Brain, and together they're a formidable bunch. However, when Mr Big catches up with them and captures Top Cat, can his new friends save the day?

programme.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood thought he saved the world when he destroyed his most infamous invention - a machine that turned water into food causing cheeseburger rain and spaghetti tornadoes. But Flint soon learns that his invention survived and is now combining food and animals to create 'foodimals'! Flint and his friends embark on an adventurously mouth-watering mission to battle hungry tacodiles, shrimpanzees, hippotatomuses, cheesepiders and other foodimals to save the world - again!

programme.title: Cloudy with a Chance of Meatballs 2
programme.desc: Inventor Flint Lockwood thought he saved the world when he destroyed his most infamous invention - a machine that turned water into food causing cheeseburger rain and spaghetti tornadoes. But Flint soon learns that his invention survived and is now combining food and animals to create 'foodimals'! Flint and his friends embark on an adventurously mouth-watering mission to battle hungry tacodiles, shrimpanzees, hippotatomuses, cheesepiders and other foodimals to save the world - again!

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time when prehistoric creatures roamed the earth, Early Man tells the story of courageous caveman Dug and his sidekick Hognob who, together with their fearless new friend Goona, must unite their Stone Age Tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time when prehistoric creatures roamed the earth, Early Man tells the story of courageous caveman Dug and his sidekick Hognob who, together with their fearless new friend Goona, must unite their Stone Age Tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. They subsequently find themselves in Madagascar amidst happy lemurs.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. They subsequently find themselves in Madagascar amidst happy lemurs.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Gru, his adorable girls, and the mischievous Minions are back with a cast of unforgettable new characters in the blockbuster sequel to the worldwide phenomenon. Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world. Partnered with secret agent Lucy Wilde, Gru, along with the wildly unpredictable Minions, must figure out how to keep his cover while also keeping up with his duties as a father. Get ready for more Minion madness.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: The Boss Baby: Family Business
programme.desc: Boss Baby continues to navigate the cutthroat corporate jungle gym of Baby Corp, while angling to achieve the near-impossible: the work-life balance of a modern career baby.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Adventure Island
programme.desc: Dinosaur siblings Buddy, Tiny, Shiny and Don try to reunite with their parents after an earthquake causes theme park robots to go rogue.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit's latest enterprise is Anti-Pesto, pest control with a heart. When called upon by the dotty Lady Tottington to solve her rabbit infestation, Wallace tangles with her Ladyship's would-be suitor, rotten cad Victor Quartermaine. At first Wallace and Gromit seem to have things in hand. But Wallace's mind transference device malfunctions, and he's in danger of being bagged by Quartermaine. Wallace teeters perilously close to disaster and his four-legged pal, Gromit, faces almost insurmountable odds to save the day!

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit's latest enterprise is Anti-Pesto, pest control with a heart. When called upon by the dotty Lady Tottington to solve her rabbit infestation, Wallace tangles with her Ladyship's would-be suitor, rotten cad Victor Quartermaine. At first Wallace and Gromit seem to have things in hand. But Wallace's mind transference device malfunctions, and he's in danger of being bagged by Quartermaine. Wallace teeters perilously close to disaster and his four-legged pal, Gromit, faces almost insurmountable odds to save the day!

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the comic misadventures of a young Peruvian bear who travels to the city in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined until he meets the kindly Brown family who read the label around his neck that says "Please look after this bear. Thank you," and offer him a temporary haven. It looks as though his luck has changed until this rarest of bears catches the eye of a museum taxidermist.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: This film tells the story of the comic misadventures of a young Peruvian bear who travels to the city in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined until he meets the kindly Brown family who read the label around his neck that says "Please look after this bear. Thank you," and offer him a temporary haven. It looks as though his luck has changed until this rarest of bears catches the eye of a museum taxidermist.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Now happily settled with the Brown family, Paddington picks up a series of odd jobs to buy the perfect present for his Aunt Lucy's 100th birthday, only for the gift to be stolen.

programme.title: Beethoven
programme.desc: Fall in love with the big-hearted, wet-nosed star of this outrageous comedy. With nefarious dognappers hot on his heels, an adorable puppy named Beethoven adopts the unsuspecting Newton family and promptly grows up into 185 pounds of romping, drooling, disaster-prone St Bernard. George is the none-too-thrilled father whose disdain for the cuddly canine turns to loyalty after Beethoven becomes the target of unspeakable animal experimentation. Now it's up to George to save the day in this fetching adventure that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: Beethoven
programme.desc: Fall in love with the big-hearted, wet-nosed star of this outrageous comedy. With nefarious dognappers hot on his heels, an adorable puppy named Beethoven adopts the unsuspecting Newton family and promptly grows up into 185 pounds of romping, drooling, disaster-prone St Bernard. George is the none-too-thrilled father whose disdain for the cuddly canine turns to loyalty after Beethoven becomes the target of unspeakable animal experimentation. Now it's up to George to save the day in this fetching adventure that's fun for the whole family.

programme.title: The Critic
programme.desc: A powerful London theatre critic lures a struggling actress into a blackmail scheme that has deadly consequences.

programme.title: The Making of Gladiator II
programme.desc: A special look at the making of Gladiator II, featuring unprecedented access encompassing all aspects of production, from the grand scope of the set to characters, combat, costumes, scoring and more.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: Can a clueless super spy save the day without denting the nation's pride, or his super-cool Aston Martin spy car?

programme.title: A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: After their parents perish in a terrible fire, three orphaned siblings are placed in the care of the evil genius Count Olaf, who hatches an outrageous plot to steal their inheritance.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Rattled by sudden unemployment, a Manhattan couple surveys alternative living options, ultimately deciding to experiment with living on a rural commune where free love rules.

programme.title: Sex Tape
programme.desc: When they make a three-hour sex tape to spice up their love life, a husband and wife realise they're in trouble when the epic recording threatens to go viral! A delightfully crude comedy.

programme.title: Wanderlust
programme.desc: Rattled by sudden unemployment, a Manhattan couple surveys alternative living options, ultimately deciding to experiment with living on a rural commune where free love rules.
